name: Ant Media Server
description: Ant Media Server — real-time and live streaming engine with WebRTC, HLS, CMAF

seo.title: Ant Media Server — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Ant Media Server: Ant Media Server — real-time and live streaming engine with WebRTC, HLS, CMAF

when_to_use: Broadcasting live events with sub-500ms WebRTC latency
Building 1:N streaming platforms with HLS/CMAF fallback
Hosting interactive live shopping streams at low latency
Self-hosted alternative to Agora for real-time video apps
Scaling WebRTC to thousands of concurrent viewers

pros: Sub-second WebRTC latency out of the box
Adaptive bitrate, HLS, CMAF, SRT all supported
cons: Enterprise features locked behind per-instance license
Documentation lags behind new feature releases
You manage infra, autoscaling, and CDN yourself
Community edition drops key codecs and recording
UI dashboard is functional but dated
review.verdict: Solid self-hosted WebRTC server if you want Wowza-class features without SaaS pricing — but you own the ops.
review.best_for: Teams with DevOps muscle building interactive live streaming on their own infra.
review.not_for: Developers who want a managed streaming API with zero ops.
